title: ZIMPLI - 10 x Christmas Multi Pack Party Bag Fillers, 10 Use Pack, Children's Assorted Xmas Goody Bag Favours, Rewards, Stocking Fillers
features: PERFECT XMAS GIFT FOR KIDS: Check out more Christmas presents in the Zimpli Kids store
10 x USES IN TOTAL: All skin safe, drain safe, easy clean & stain free and is proudly made in the UK to strict European safety standards

2 x SLIME PLAY & 2 x GELLI PLAY: Slime Play magically turns your water into gooey, colourful slime & Gelli Play magically turns your water into thick, colourful goo, both can be drained away safely and easily by following the instructions
2 x SNOBALL PLAY: Magically turns your water into artifical snow, great for home decorations or Children's indoor & outdoor sensory play
2 x CRACKLE BAFF: Magically makes your bath water crackle, pop and change colour, just like popping candy
2 x BAFF WATER COLOURS: Create a colourful bath time experience with bath drops

product_details_tab_data.Title: ZIMPLI - 10 x Christmas Multi Pack Party Bag Fillers, 10 Use Pack, Children's Assorted Xmas Goody Bag Favours, Rewards, Stocking Fillers
product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Toys & Games › Novelty & Gag Toys › Slime & Putty Toys
product_details_tab_data.Included Components: 1 x Gelli Baff, 1 x Slime Baff, 2 x Crackle Baff, 2 x Gelli Play, 2 x Slime Play, 2 x SnoBall Play
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: GELLI IS SLIPPY. Not suitable for children under 3 years old due to small part choking hazard. Adult supervision required at all times. If Gelli gets on the floor/surfaces wipe it up immediately as it will be slippery. If product gets into eyes, wash with water for 10 minutes. If symptoms persist seek medical advice. Non-irritant formula. For sensitive skin, test a small amount on skin first. Non-edible product, DO NOT EAT. If product is swallowed, drink plenty of fresh water. Product is non-toxic. To avoid possible staining with the Gelli do not let the skin or any surface come into contact with the powder before adding it to water. Once added to water it is stain free. Whilst making your Gelli, we recommend stirring with a large spoon or spatula. Do not empty onto grass. Keep packaging for future reference. SLIME IS SLIPPY. Not suitable for children under 3 years old due to small part choking hazard. Adult supervision required at all times. If Slime gets on the floor/surfaces wipe it up immediately as it will be slippery. If product gets into eyes, wash with water for 10 minutes. If symptoms persist seek medical advice. Non-irritant formula. For sensitive skin, test a small amount on skin first. Non-edible product, DO NOT EAT. If product is swallowed, drink plenty of fresh water. Product is non-toxic. To avoid possible staining with the Slime do not let the skin or any surface come into contact with the powder before adding it to water. Once added to water it is stain free. Whilst making your Slime, we recommend stirring with a large spoon or spatula. Do not empty onto grass. Keep packaging for future reference. SNOBALLS CAN BE SLIPPY. Not suitable for children under 3 years old due to small part choking hazard. Adult supervision required at all times. Do not aim at eyes or face. If product gets into eyes, wash with water for 10 minutes. If symptoms persist seek medical advice. Non-irritant formula. For sensitive skin, test a small amount on skin first. Non-edible product, DO NOT EAT. If product is swallowed, drink plenty of fresh water. Product is non-toxic. Keep packaging for future reference. Ensure snow is rinsed off painted and wooden surfaces after use. Do not leave large clumps on grass. Not suitable for children under 3 years old due to small part choking hazard. Adult supervision required at all times. If product gets into eyes, wash with water for 10 minutes. If symptoms persist seek medical advice. Non-irritant formula. For sensitive skin, test a small amount on skin first. Avoid sitting on Crackle Baff crystals until they have fully dissolved To avoid possible staining with the Crackle do not let the skin or any surface come into contact with the powder before adding it to water. Once added to water it is stain free. If product falls on surfaces, wipe up immediately. Non-edible product, DO NOT EAT. If product is swallowed, drink plenty of fresh water. Product is non-toxic. Will not clog drains. Keep packaging for future reference.
